Title: Runnable: CurrCtrl_Init
Description: Set IdIntgState=0, IqIntgState=0, VdCmd=0, VqCmd=0. Cache CalPrm to locals.
Notes: Runnable ShortName=CurrCtrl_Init; RTE Event=InitEvent; Cycle / Condition=Once at ECU startup; Ports Read=IdRef, IqRef, IdFbk, IqFbk, VdcBus; Ports Written=VdCmd, VqCmd; CalPrm Used=CurrCtrlPrm (all); IRV Read=—; IRV Written=IdIntgState, IqIntgState; ExclusiveArea=—; Init Required=Yes; Return Type=void; Timing Budget=<50 µs

Title: Runnable: CurrCtrl_100us
Description: 1. Read IdFbk, IqFbk (sint16 → float32 via ×0.01)2. Read IqRef (float32), IdRef (sint16→float32)3. Compute errors: idErr=IdRef-IdFbk; iqErr=IqRef-IqFbk4. d-axis PI: Vd = KpId*idErr + IdIntg; IdIntg+=KiId*idErr*100e-65. q-axis PI: Vq = KpIq*iqErr + IqIntg; IqIntg+=KiIq*iqErr*100e-66. Decoupling FF: Vd -= omega*Lq*IqFbk; Vq += omega*Ld*IdFbk7. Voltage circle limiting: if |Vdq|>VoltLim*Vdc/sqrt(3) → scale down8. Convert float Vd/Vq → sint16 (×100) and write ports
Notes: 10 kHz — tightest timing constraint in system. No dynamic memory.; Runnable ShortName=CurrCtrl_100us; RTE Event=TimingEvent; Cycle / Condition=100 µs (10 kHz); Ports Read=IdFbk, IqFbk, IdRef, IqRef, VdcBus; Ports Written=VdCmd, VqCmd; CalPrm Used=KpId, KiId, KpIq, KiIq, VdcNom, VoltLim, Ld, Lq, Rs; IRV Read=—; IRV Written=IdIntgState, IqIntgState; ExclusiveArea=EA_CurrIntg; Init Required=No; Return Type=void; Timing Budget=<30 µs
